attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TRANSACTION_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ORG_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.OPERATING_UNIT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROFILE_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ACC_RULE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.HDR_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.LINE_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.LINE_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ELEMENT_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RC_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.SRC_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RAE_ADJ_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RC_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RAE_DEF_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RAE_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_DEF_RAE_POSTED,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.COMMENTS,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), 
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_HOLD_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TSS_HOLD_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ASS_HOLD_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.AST_HOLD_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.OTH_HOLD_AMT, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.HOLD_COMMENTS,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), 
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TSS_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ASS_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.AST_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.OTH_REL_AMT,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.REL_BOOKING_COMMENTS,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),  
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_NET_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TSS_NET_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ASS_NET_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.AST_NET_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.OTH_NET_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CREATE_BY, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RAE_POSTED_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ERROR_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT1, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT2, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT3, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT4, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT5, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.CR_SEGMENT6, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT1, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT2, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT3, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT4, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT5, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT6, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ENTERED_CURRENCY, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.EXCHANGE_RATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.EXCHANGE_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_SOURCE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.AUTO_EXECUTE_FLAG,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_DESCRIPTION,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ASSOCIATE_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.EXECUTION_EVENT_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DOWNSTREAM_DIRECTION, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_START_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_BATCH_ID, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_POSTED_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_POSTED_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_IFACED_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.FUNC_CURRENCY, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_STATUS, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE1, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE2, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE3, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE4, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE5, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE6, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE7, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE8, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE9, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE10, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE11, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE12, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE13, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE14, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE15, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ACTION_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_POSTED_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_IFACED_DATE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.START_PERIOD, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.FISCAL_PERIOD, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.USAGE_RECLASS_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_REL_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RC_NAME, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.SRC_NAME, 
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.SOURCE_KEY,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.ERROR_MESSAGE,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RAE_CALL_TYPE, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DEF_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DEF_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TOTAL_DEF,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.DEF_COMMENT,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), 
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.REL_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.REL_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TOTAL_REL,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.RELEASE_COMMENT,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_DEF_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_DEF_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_DEF, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_PROV,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_COMMENT,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_CHANNEL_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_REL_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_REL_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_PROV_REL,
REPLACE(REPLACE(NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_REL_COMMENT,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
 NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROV_REL_CHANNEL_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_PRO_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_PRO_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.NET_PRO, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_POSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_UNPOSTED, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_SUB_HOLD_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_SUB_REL_AMT, NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS.PROD_SUB_NET_AMT 
FROM
 NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS_MV   NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS
WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
